name: Depreciation Input Validation
short_description: Ensures that inputs for asset depreciation calculations meet necessary constraints, including positive cost and useful life, months_used between 1 and 12 (if provided), and non-negative salvage_value less than cost (if provided).

inputs.name: cost
inputs.description: The original cost of the asset.

inputs.name: useful_life
inputs.description: The estimated useful life of the asset in years.

inputs.name: months_used
inputs.description: Number of months the asset was used in the first year (optional, for partial year depreciation).

inputs.name: salvage_value
inputs.description: The estimated salvage value of the asset at the end of its useful life (optional).

name: Straight-Line Depreciation Expense
short_description: Calculates the annual depreciation expense for an asset using the straight-line method, considering its initial cost, useful life, and salvage value.

inputs.name: cost
inputs.description: The initial cost of the asset.

inputs.name: useful_life
inputs.description: The estimated useful life of the asset in years.

inputs.name: salvage_value
inputs.description: The estimated salvage value of the asset at the end of its useful life.

name: Sum-of-the-Years-Digits Depreciation
short_description: A company applies the sum-of-the-years-digits (SYD) method to depreciate an asset. The objective is to determine the depreciation expense for a specific year.

inputs.name: cost
inputs.description: Initial cost of the asset

inputs.name: useful_life
inputs.description: Useful life of the asset in years

inputs.name: year
inputs.description: The specific year for which depreciation is calculated (1-indexed)

name: Partial-Year Depreciation and Asset Disposal
short_description: Calculates depreciation for an asset acquired mid-year and the gain or loss on its disposal before the end of its useful life, using straight-line depreciation with full-month convention.

inputs.name: cost
inputs.description: Initial cost of the asset.

inputs.name: useful_life
inputs.description: Estimated useful life of the asset in years.

inputs.name: months_held_in_first_year
inputs.description: Number of months the asset was held and depreciated in the acquisition year (e.g., 3 for April acquisition, assuming full-month convention).

inputs.name: sale_year
inputs.description: The year number (from acquisition) when the asset is sold. Must be less than useful_life.

inputs.name: sale_price
inputs.description: The price at which the asset is sold.

name: Asset Impairment Loss (Value in Use)
short_description: Calculates the impairment loss of an asset by comparing its carrying amount with the higher of net selling price and value in use.

inputs.name: cost
inputs.description: Original cost of the asset

inputs.name: accumulated_depreciation
inputs.description: Total accumulated depreciation of the asset

inputs.name: net_selling_price
inputs.description: Estimated net selling price (fair value less costs to sell) of the asset

inputs.name: value_in_use
inputs.description: Calculated value in use of the asset (present value of future cash flows)

name: Asset Impairment Loss Reversal
short_description: Calculates the carrying amount of an asset after an impairment loss and subsequent reversal, verifying compliance with IFRS rules that limit the reversal amount to not exceed the carrying amount net of depreciation had no impairment occurred.

inputs.name: original_cost
inputs.description: Original cost of the asset.

inputs.name: useful_life
inputs.description: Estimated useful life of the asset in years.

inputs.name: years_used
inputs.description: Number of years the asset was used before the initial impairment.

inputs.name: impairment_loss
inputs.description: The previously recognized impairment loss amount.

inputs.name: reversal_amount
inputs.description: The amount of impairment loss reversal recognized.
